must_detect.matched_text:
A con sent with drawal for marketing from Ms. Bruna Setti (applicant) was received 2026‑06‑03 and honoured before the incident; suppression list ID su‑pp‑348 remains active.
A DSAR from Mr. Oskar Nylen (employee) was logged as DSAR‑EU‑1907; access copy delivered 2026‑06‑05 and no cross‑border copies were retained.
Erasure ticket ERA‑1140 closed 2026‑06‑05 for the two Art. 9 files; HR onboarding retention for Kavaria DataWorks was reduced from 30 to 7 days effective immediately.
MNPI check (EU MAR): the same SFTP folder held a draft CSRD ESRS E1 Scope‑3 KPI and SFDR PAI table for H1 (project “GreenBeam‑R3”), precise and not yet public, potentially price‑sensitive.
Insider list VLRN‑IL‑A12 was updated and delay of disclosure logged; logs show no access by non‑insiders and no exfiltration, so no immediate ad‑hoc disclosure is required under issuer policy.
No MAC addresses, IMEIs, or device fingerprints were captured in these transfers; a public factsheet on 2025 emissions already exists and is not in scope here.
Operational fix completed: the cross‑border route was disabled at 23:02 CET and the vendor onboarding form (Onboard‑KAV‑22B) was corrected to default EU storage; Compliance Memo CM‑PII‑77 filed 2026‑06‑05; this is a completed control, not a live risk.
